full_text:
Tan Shao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tan Shao. The son-in-law of Lady Pan’s elder sister. After Pan’s death, made chief commendant of calvary. Tan Shao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
